strings.SCA_f_desc: For untold centuries, the Kingdoms of the North have been divided and locked in internecine power struggles. If we want to stand tall amongst the great powers of the world, we must strive to create a lasting union between our peoples, as difficult as this might seem.
strings.sweden_f_desc: The vast lands of Sweden were unified for centuries, and this union must be reaffirmed. With significant portions of the Swedish lands now under our control, we can finally revive this ancient legacy and once again claim a united Swedish nation.
strings.denmark_f_desc: Denmark, situated between the North Sea and Baltic Sea, is a country with great significance for [ShowRegionName('scandinavian_region')]. If we can control enough of its territory, we could reform it, and restore the legacy birthed by our forebears.
strings.DRD_f_desc: The [ShowLanguageName('gaelic_language')] peoples on the coasts around the [ShowAreaName('hebrides_area')] first united long ago, forming a kingdom famous for its seafaring culture and the strength of its fleet. We must claim this ancestral legacy and revive the kingdom.
strings.GBR_f_desc: By uniting our political development domestically and extending our influence beyond our borders, we will be able to reinforce our position in world affairs and transform into one of the foremost European powers, the British Empire.
strings.ENG_f_desc: Trade has long been a foundation of English national policy. By extending our influence across borders and controlling its political development domestically, we have managed to become a major European power. Our colonial expansion is becoming a major factor in promoting our nation's economic growth, reinforcing our position in world affairs.
strings.WLS_f_desc: Free from the influence of faraway rulers, the Welsh people will establish their own state, governing themselves without the intervention or consent of others. Like the great red dragon of legend, the Welsh will emerge triumphant from the throes of conflict!
strings.SCO_f_desc: The once proud nation of Scotland has fallen into ruin. Yet, despite our shattered state, there remain some among the Clans with the will to restore our kingdom. We will muster our courage and fight for a free and independent Scotland!
strings.NOL_f_desc: For too long, the lands of the Northumbrians have been governed by southerners or people from across the sea. It is time for us to take the reins of our nation and reclaim the glory our ancestors once knew. The lords of the North shall rise once more!
strings.IRE_f_desc: For decades, England has attempted to subjugate the Irish population and control the island and its inhabitants from afar. Uniting Irish lands under a single flag and purpose may be our only chance to repel these merciless conquerors!
strings.MTH_f_desc: Meath was once counted among the great provinces of Ireland, a kingdom whose kings held sway over much of Leinster and whose territory encompassed the ancient seat of Tara. By consolidating our hold over these lands, we can restore that ancient legacy and reclaim the kingdom's rightful place among the realms of Ireland.
strings.MCM_f_desc: Munster, the great southern province of Ireland, was home to kings such as Brian Boru who once claimed the high kingship of the whole island. With Munster's fertile lands and Atlantic harbours under our banner, we shall revive this ancient kingdom and stand as masters of the south.
strings.SPA_f_desc: Since the defeat of the Visigoths by the [ShowReligionGroupAdjective('muslim')] invasion in the 8th century, Iberia has been the seat of several independent kingdoms. Numerous would-be conquerors have since attempted to unify the region, proclaiming themselves rulers of 'Hispania,' 'Spania,' or — as it is now known — 'Spain.' But it is we who shall finally unify the Peninsula once and for all!
strings.ADU_f_desc: Once all of Iberia was commanded by the glorious Muslim rulers of Al-'Andalus, who brought unparalleled beauty and innovation with their reign. Let us now repudiate the shameful [ShowReligionGroupAdjective('christian')] Reconquista, and retake the rightful lands of our ancestors.
strings.EGY_f_desc: While the history of Egypt is beyond ancient, it was for vast stretches of time ruled by foreign invaders, not its native souls. Forging a new Egyptian state free from outside interference could restore our legendary Empire, much as the Nile overflows and replenishes the land along its banks.
strings.KOA_f_desc: In days past, the Normans created a Christian kingdom in Africa, bridging both sides of the Mediterranean. But that fledgling nation was decimated, devoured by the enemies of Christ. Now that it is within our reach to do so, it is our duty to recover that territory and bring the glory of our Lord to them once again.
strings.BEJ_f_desc: Our people have traditionally been divided among several clans and families, some powerful enough to call themselves kingdoms. However, their apparent strength is in actuality extremely fragile. Only a realm that unites all clans under a single banner can bring true power and prosperity to our people!
strings.ETH_f_desc: The ancient empire of Ethiopia was the spiritual successor to the Aksumite Empire, the legendary home of King Solomon's son, and a stalwart bulwark of the Coptic faith. The fall of that Empire was a tragedy for the Coptic faithful, but the spirit of a unified Ethiopia still lives on, waiting to be revived by a worthy successor — like us!
strings.BAV_f_desc: The once-lofty Duchy of Bavaria was a bastion of economic and diplomatic power, with its enviable location and gifted population. But despite its bright past, it now lies in pieces, divided and weak. We must reunite its former territories and reclaim the glories of the past if we wish to be more than a mere footnote in history!
strings.HAB_f_desc: From Wien, the house of Habsburg once held absolute power in the [GetInternationalOrganizationType('hre').GetName], and the very core of that power was the Archduchy of Austria. Now that empire has long since turned to ash, and the time has come for us to reclaim the Archduchy and the seat of Imperial power!
strings.BOH_f_desc: Ever since the Golden Bull of Sicily was granted to Ottokar I in 1212, the lands of [ShowAreaName('bohemia_area')] enjoyed an elevated status within Central [ShowContinentName('europe')]. With our control of the area, we will be able to reestablish the old title and align ourselves with the legacies of the old dynasties of [ShowAreaNameWithNoTooltip('bohemia_area')].
strings.SAX_f_desc: The Duchy of Saxony was once an influential stem duchy within the old empire. While its core territories have shifted over time, the title has retained its prestige and renown. If we wish to be recognized as the rightful heir to the Saxon title, we must persuade the Emperor of the [GetInternationalOrganizationType('hre').GetName] to become an elector, a role which will be given to the Duke of Saxony.
strings.NSA_f_desc: Although the Duchy of Nassau was neither the most stable nor the most famous of its peers, our founding dynasty connects us to many crowned heads of [ShowContinentName('europe')], giving us a strong position from which to claim authority. To make our voice within Germany heard, we must unify the lands of Nassau once and for all and reassert the strength of this dynastic legacy, preventing any further fracturing of our rightful territory.
strings.MKL_f_desc: With the unification of the Mecklenburgian territories, we can create a new, independent Dukedom within northern Germany. This new state will be able to undo the mistakes of the past, avoiding the fracturing of our territories into multiple sovereign countries and creating a counterbalance to the rivals who covet our lands.
strings.POM_f_desc: Pomeranian territory occupies a vital position along the Baltic coastline. If we want to profit from our strategic position, and take advantage of being on a busy trade route, we must do away with the old divisions and succession squabbles, and reform a united Pomeranian Duchy.
strings.PRU_f_desc: The land once conquered and Germanized by the Teutonic Order will always require protection against rapacious outside forces. But should the Order fail in this duty, we can take their place and usher in a new era of prosperity and Prussian discipline.
strings.LIV_f_desc: The lands of Curonia, Livonia, and Estonia were once part of the Livonian Order, who swore to convert their conquered territories to [ShowReligionGroupName('christian')]. While the Order built a functioning state, it did so on the backs of the very people it had conquered, who planted seeds of resentment alongside their crops. Should the Order fail to uphold the order of society, they would be easy enough to replace with a bit of force and Livonian courage.
strings.LVA_f_desc: The vast lands of the Baltic region have long been divided among various tribes and Germanic states, none of which have been able to assert dominance over the others. However, the time has come for a new power to rise from these lands, uniting the diverse peoples of the Baltic under a single banner and identity.
strings.GER_f_desc: Despite the absence of a strong central authority, our nation is prospering. The wealthy Hanseatic League, formed by hundreds of towns in northern Germany, has made our nation incredibly prosperous. Intellectual growth, combined with sea and overland trading, has also helped spur development and transform our country into a wealthy hub of manufacturing and intellectual innovation.
strings.LAT_f_desc: The old $ROM_f$ survived centered around [ShowLocationName('constantinople')], although they followed [ShowReligionName('orthodox')] instead of the proper [ShowReligionAdjective('catholic')] faith of [ShowLocationName('rome')]. As such, it is our sacred duty to supplant them as $BYZ_eastern_rome$, establishing a [ShowReligionAdjectiveWithNoTooltip('catholic')] Emperor in [ShowLocationNameWithNoTooltip('constantinople')].
strings.THE_f_desc: A short-lived [GetCountry('THE').GetFlavorRank] established by the crusaders in [ShowScriptedGeographyName('greece_geography')] in the aftermath of the Fourth Crusade, its rulers wielded great influence in the [GetCountry('LAT').GetLongName]. While it was destroyed by [GetCharacter('the_theodoros_komnenos_doukas').GetName] in 1224, should we manage to reclaim its contested territories, it would make us a considerable power in [ShowScriptedGeographyNameWithNoTooltip('greece_geography')].
strings.SAR_f_desc: Our island has long been bitterly divided between our Judicates and foreign rulers. These dark times must end, and a ruler who unifies Sardinia shall govern us all, bringing peace and prosperity to our people... and war and devastation to our enemies. As they justly deserve.
strings.MSI_f_desc: We are a people deeply devoted to our unique beliefs and traditions, proud of our political acumen and military strength. Yet despite our deeply ingrained culture, our people have failed to unify as a single group, and the consequences of that division have been dire. Only through unity can our people find peace and enjoy prosperity — we must achieve it!
strings.MAZ_f_desc: Despite being one of the major [ShowCultureGroupName('polish_group')] cultures, the Mazovians are culturally and linguistically distinct from other [ShowCultureGroupNameWithNoTooltip('polish_group')] groups. Given this, it seems fitting for our people to demand the unification of all Mazovian lands under a single ruler, as only that way will we be able to fully demonstrate our unique power and glory to the world.
strings.KRY_f_desc: Situated on the shores of the [ShowAreaName('caspian_sea_area')] and in the heart of [ShowCultureName('gilak_culture')], Gilan has existed under the shadow of [ShowRegionName('persia_region')] for centuries. The time has come for us to establish its presence on the world stage, and emerge as an independent power.
strings.RYU_f_desc: Inhabited by the [ShowCultureName('ryukyu_culture')] people and boasting a unique culture and identity, the islands of [ShowAreaName('ryuukyuu_area')] have always been fragmented due to their own nature. However, uniting the kingdoms of the three mountains would build a nation of great prosperity and culture — one that could change the entire course of history.
strings.MOL_f_desc: For too long, the Moldovans have lived under different warlords, who in turn were subjects of more powerful rulers. But now the moment has come to supplant these odious middlemen and crush the rule of our oppressors! It is time to reunite our people under the banner of the Bull, and ensure the bright and independent future of our nation.
strings.SIL_f_desc: Silesia has been divided into Duchies and ruled from foreign capitals for centuries. Like jewels on a broken necklace, each part yearns to be restored to its whole and perfect state. Therefore, the hour has come for Silesia to cast aside foreign rule and quench the fires of internal division, creating a new, unified Silesian nation.
strings.POL_f_desc: The kingdom that the Piasts once worked so hard to reunify is now divided and without leadership. There is too much glory in our history and too much promise in our future to allow Poland to remain cut into pieces — we must strive to unite the Polish people and create a nation that will shine even brighter than our kingdoms of the past!
strings.PLC_f_desc: By uniting the crowns of Lithuania and Poland under the same banner, we will become a beacon of hope and faith in Eastern Europe, bringing our light to the heart of even the darkest forests flourishing across our lands.
strings.UKR_f_desc:
Centuries ago, the land of the Rus' was united under a single banner and ruled from the legendary city of [ShowLocationName('kyiv')]. But the Mongol hordes advanced from the great steppe, pillaging and burning as they went. Even great [ShowLocationNameWithNoTooltip('kyiv')] itself could not avoid this fate. In terror, our people fled north into the hinterlands we today call Russia.
Now a new, arrogant northern city is on the rise. Its ruler envisions a new Rus' — A Rus' centered in [ShowLocationName('moscow')] and not [ShowLocationNameWithNoTooltip('kyiv')]. But we Ruthenians will not allow pretenders to claim the legacy of our forefathers! [ShowLocationNameWithNoTooltip('kyiv')] shall rise once again, and so too shall the Rus'!
strings.ROM_f_desc: Not since the second century has one empire commanded the entirety of the Mediterranean and beyond, and that empire was mighty Rome. If we claim this land, we can scoff at whatever pretenders may claim in Constantinople or the Holy Roman Empire, and proclaim ourselves as the #italic true#! successors of the Roman Empire. #italic Cives Romani sumus#!!
strings.ROM_BYZ_f_desc: We are the true successors of the Roman Empire, and we will not allow barbarians to claim our legacy! By reestablishing ourselves in Italia, we will prove to the rump states of the West that we are the true heirs of Rome!
strings.CTH_f_desc: The foul dogs of the Roman Empire burned the Carthaginian homeland to the ground, trying to erase every single memory of this ancient civilization. Gone may be their identity, culture and religion, but as long as a single Roman pretender exists, so does the need for a foil to these charlatans. We shall become the scourge to all those fools who glorify the Romans; we shall become the Heirs of Carthage!
strings.NSE_f_desc: The lands once owned by [GetCharacter('eng_cnut_the_great').GetName] extended over both sides of the [ShowAreaName('north_sea_area')], from [ShowRegionName('scandinavian_region')] to [ShowRegionName('great_britain_region')]. Although this territory has fragmented and reformed into different holdings over time, it has always been lying in wait, eagerly anticipating our rise and reclamation. It is time to establish this incredible empire once again, with all those lands coming together under our banner.
strings.MAY_f_desc: For centuries, our people have been divided into independent cities, which themselves have been locked in bitter competition with each other. This has created an environment of energy and innovation, but we lack the unity needed to stay strong in the face of external pressures. By unifying all Mayan settlements into a single realm, our nation will thrive, and reach the heights of power it soundly deserves to reach.
strings.AIA_f_desc: The sands of [ShowRegionName('arabia_region')] are the home and origin of the [ShowCultureGroupName('arabian_group')] people. Although divided into multiple tribes since their beginnings, their shared identity and traditions are undeniable, crossing the vast sands along with its peoples. [ShowRegionNameWithNoTooltip('arabia_region')] was unified once before, and it conquered nearly the entire world. Now it must do so again.
strings.ULS_f_desc: At the heart of the [ShowLanguageName('gaelic_language')] world and one of the traditional #italic Cúige#!, the Five Provinces of [ShowRegionName('ireland_region')], $ULS_f$ has a unique presence in the world. But our people yearn to do and be more than we already are, and as such, the time has come for $ULS_f$ to assert itself as a major player on the world stage.
strings.CEL_f_desc: The [ShowCultureGroupName('celtic_group')] peoples have a history spanning millennia. Although over the centuries they have suffered invasions from other peoples and seen their territory reduced to a shadow of their ancestral holdings, they have never fully lost their traditional beliefs, culture, or way of life. If a strong leader were to emerge and show them the way, the [ShowCultureGroupNameWithNoTooltip('celtic_group')] could unite once more, and finally claim their rightful place of power in this world.
strings.MLC_f_desc: Situated on a crucial maritime trade route, the straits of [ShowLocationName('malacca')] have always maintained control of the trade flowing through, and thus control of its wealth. Perfectly positioned to benefit from this trade, and holding a land itself rich in resources and tradition, the [ShowCultureName('malay_culture')] people have always flourished in these lands. With a unified identity, they will flourish even more.
strings.NED_f_desc: The Dutch are emerging as one of Europe's most capable naval and colonial powers. Lucrative trade opportunities, locally and overseas, have resulted in a swift evolution that has transformed the country into one of the first capitalist nations in history. Complementing this superlative economic acumen are the Dutch talents for innovation and creativity, which turn our culture into a light shining all over the world. A unified Dutch state, therefore, stands to be one of the wealthiest and most influential of all time.
strings.EUR_f_desc: The land of [ShowContinentName('europe')] is home to a huge variety of people. With so many cultures, religions, languages, and lifestyles living side by side, [ShowContinentNameWithNoTooltip('europe')] has seen its share of neighborly conflicts as well as cultural synthesis and cooperation. The idea of such a diverse population working towards a single goal seems highly improbable. However, if all the different groups in [ShowContinentNameWithNoTooltip('europe')] united under a single banner and identity, we would achieve nearly unprecedented global power.
strings.RUS_f_desc: Through conquest and diplomacy, Russia has managed to transform itself from a tiny settlement into a dominant power. After several expeditions in the east, the Mongol hordes have finally been subdued, and a centralized Russian state under the suzerainty of the Tsar is emerging. Influences from Western Europe are helping us modernize and reform our nation, and we are adopting a more modern style of education. Given our history of rapid growth and our modern political and cultural gifts, it seems only natural that the Russian Empire should rise and hold sway over lesser nations.
strings.ITA_f_desc: As the heart of the Renaissance, our nation's culture is blossoming. We seem to have just entered a period of prolonged artistic innovation, especially in the fields of architecture and literature, and are reaping the rewards accordingly. This cultural evolution does not help us maintain peace within our borders, however, and our country is continuously stricken by foreign states seeking power and territorial gain. Perhaps it is time to unite in a decisive demonstration of our power — if for no other reason than to intimidate would-be usurpers by displaying a united front.
strings.TWS_f_desc: The Two Sicilies...not a country, but a dream. A dream to unify the lands kissed by the waters of the Straits of Messina — the Sicilies that stand on both sides of the 'Punta del Faro.' It is our duty to make that dream come true.
strings.FRA_f_desc: This year will mark the beginning of an evolutionary period for our nation. The old feudal ways must make way for a more modern, centralized state.
strings.LOT_f_desc: As the new claimants to the $LOT_ADJ$ crown, we confirmed our legitimacy by appealing to the legacy of [GetCharacter('fra_charlemagne').GetName] and [GetCharacter('fra_lothair').GetName]. Under our patronage, the exploits of our ancestors have once again become common knowledge, both among our own people and throughout the courts of Europe.
strings.BGP_f_desc: Back in the day, the Burgunds came down from Bornholm, settled in these lands, and gave them their name. As their descendants, our honor requires us to recreate that nation and govern these lands until the end of time.
strings.GRE_f_desc: Since the earliest days of our civilization, Hellas has been divided, whether internally by its many competing kingdoms, or occupied by foreigners at the hands of our common enemies. Over the centuries, our power dwindled as we were conquered, split up, and our treasures taken by conquerors. It is an insult to our extensive legacy of art, sport, and invention to exist in such a fragmented state! To unite the Greek lands under one flag and one ruler is our only path back to the greatness of our past.
strings.BYZ_f_desc: The glorious Byzantine Empire is long gone, but as long as Greeks live in [ShowLocationName('constantinople')], there is hope of its resurrection. Like a phoenix swirling back to life from a pile of ashes, so too must the remnants of Eastern Rome. But before we can reunite into a vital empire, we must quell internal dissent and ensure we are all working towards the same goal. After all, we can take the place of the Byzantine Empire in spirit, but we cannot take its name until we prove worthy of it...
strings.CNN_f_desc: One of the traditional kingdoms of [ShowRegionName('ireland_region')], $CNN_f$ boasts a long and storied history. Having gained enough influence to obtain High Kingship over the whole island, $CNN_f$ has a certain claim to tradition and leadership — but whether we will be able to stand firm in the face of would-be oppressors or not depends on our unification.
strings.HEN_f_desc: The [ShowLanguageName('brythonic_language')] peoples could once be found all over the region of [ShowRegionName('great_britain_region')]. Although they were first forced away from the southern lands by both the Romans and the Anglo-Saxons, they managed to maintain a strong presence in the northern parts of the island until the arrival of the [ShowLanguageName('gaelic_language')] peoples. Over time, we started losing our mother tongue and culture... but no more! It is time to reclaim the old kingdom of the north, and see the [ShowLanguageNameWithNoTooltip('brythonic_language')] people unified by law as well as by language.
strings.USA_f_desc: We the people are exhausted: by foreign rulers who see us as property, by oppressive and abusive taxation policies when we ourselves have no say in our government, and by the cruelty of our Loyalist neighbors. Long have these colonies been subject to the greed of European powers, but no more! The surge of liberty in the colonies has granted us an opportunity to form a proud federation of independent states free from tyranny. Give us liberty, or give us death!
strings.CAN_f_desc: The land of [ShowRegionName('canada_region')] is vast and foreboding, yet incredibly bountiful and rich in resources. Although the terrain can be extremely harsh, there is great promise — and fortune — in these lands. If we were to declare ourselves as a unified $CAN_ADJ$ nation and claim it for ourselves, there is no limit to the potential rewards we could reap!
strings.MEX_f_desc: The lands of [ShowRegionName('mesoamerica_region')] are rich and plentiful, with a diverse population and a long history of civilization. Yet we are fractured between different groups, and weakened by internal bickering over power and resources between those groups. It is time we establish a new identity for all of us, one that shows off our strength, power, and enviable history while also presenting a unified and impenetrable front to the rest of the world.
strings.DEC_f_desc: This land was once foreign to our ancestors, but we have made it our own. Here we have built a new society where Persian influences have met local ancient Indian traditions. We have our own language, our own administrative traditions and our own myths and legends. It is time we show the world that the South has overcome its differences and is united as one.
strings.MHR_f_desc: The [ShowCultureName('marathi_culture')] peoples have been fragmented for many years, but remain proud of our literary achievements and unique language. While unification may not be foremost in our peoples' minds, [ShowCultureName('marathi_culture')] warriors all over Deccan will gather to our banners if we show clear leadership and acquire all the great forts of the Desh. Let us unite the clans, and go forth to rule India once and for all!
strings.HIN_f_desc: People from $india$, although highly diverse in culture, traditions, and beliefs, all belong to this same land, and share its history. Therefore, we must put aside these differences and work towards a common goal of establishing a strong $HIN$ state, presenting ourselves as a unified people against any who might oppose us.
strings.PUN_f_desc: The [ShowCultureName('punjabi')] people are only too familiar with foreign invasions, having endured wave after wave of conquest over the centuries. But these incursions have led to enormous advances in our economic and religious practices, as well as a flourishing of literary arts. But we must unite the [ShowCultureName('punjabi')] people if we wish to ever stand on our own against foreign invaders. Together, we will build a modern state with armies capable of taking on anyone who wishes to seize our territories and crush our faith!
strings.RJP_f_desc: The lands of [ShowAreaName('rajputana_area')] have been shattered and weak ever since the Muslim invasion. But that was centuries ago, and our people have begun to raise their heads from the yoke of our oppressors, seeking a place closer to the stars where we belong. We must reclaim the legendary cities held by the great dynasties that came before us, and unite the princes of [ShowAreaNameWithNoTooltip('rajputana_area')]!
strings.GUJ_f_desc: [ShowAreaName('gujarat_area')] has always had an identity distinct from the rest of $india$, and [ShowLanguageName('gujarati_language')] people are proud of their ancient history and unique identity. We long for a nation of our own, where we may rule by these idiosyncratic principles. Luckily for us, it seems the moment to seize our independence is quickly approaching…
strings.SHA_f_desc: The [ShowLanguageFamilyName(tai_language_family)] peoples of the [ShowAreaName('shan_highland_area')] have long been masters of our domain. We have carved the surrounding hills into terraced farms; we have built temples that will stand forever in testament to our gods. Yet we are also cursed by being trapped between larger, more powerful nations, often swept up in their fighting. But no more — although we were once divided, we Shan now stand as one against them all!
strings.SIA_f_desc: The [ShowCultureName('thai_culture')] people live divided by mountains and river valleys, between overlapping spheres of influence, and thus have always gravitated towards local centers of power rather than a central authority. But a unified [ShowCultureNameWithNoTooltip('thai_culture')] homeland would be more beneficial than our current dispersed nature — that consolidation of our power would make it much easier to lead our people to greatness.
strings.BAN_f_desc: The [ShowCultureName('sundanese_culture')] from [ShowLocationName('banten')] can boast of great prosperity, due to their unfettered access to both overland and maritime trade routes. Being a very well-situated port, [ShowLocationNameWithNoTooltip('banten')] serves as a perfect place from which to expand [ShowCultureNameWithNoTooltip('sundanese_culture')] power and to spread our influence.
strings.IRA_f_desc:
[ShowRegionName('persia_region')] has been the seat of powerful empires since the ancient days of Cyrus the Great. Without these [ShowCultureGroupName('iranian_group')] kingdoms of the past, our modern world would be decades behind where we are now in terms of invention, science, and the arts.

We now dwell in the dust of that greatness, dreaming of a unified [ShowCultureGroupNameWithNoTooltip('iranian_group')] state, but perhaps not for much longer — the possibility of a resurrected [ShowCultureGroupNameWithNoTooltip('iranian_group')] nation does not seem so intangible anymore. It is time for us to reclaim our glorious legacy, and to elevate one of our own with the title of $rank_kingdom_persian_ruler_male$.
strings.SKO_f_desc: The presence of [ShowReligionGroupName('muslim')] in the region of Western [ShowContinentName('africa')] is ever-precarious. With so many different peoples represented in our population, we run the risk of religious conflict erupting at any moment, both inside and coming from outside our borders. Under the guidance of our [ROOT.GetCountry.GetGovernment.GetEstateNameWithNoTooltip('clergy_estate')], we must establish an orthodox Islamic state to ensure the survival of [ShowReligionName('sunni')] people in this region.
strings.HAU_f_desc: After decades of feuds and wars shattering our land, the old rivalries have finally been quashed, and peace realized. For the first time in living memory, the sons of Bawo are again reunited under the same banner. It is time for the Hausa to rise as one again!
strings.KON_f_desc: The [ShowLanguageName('kongo_language')] people are a branch of the [ShowLanguageFamilyName('bantu_language_family')]. Although great diversity exists among our people, we also have many commonalities in our daily spiritual and cultural practices. If we connect along these shared characteristics and agree to be a united nation rather than an assortment of individual settlements, the [ShowLanguageNameWithNoTooltip('kongo_language')]-speaking peoples will be able to achieve more than ever before.
strings.NTR_f_desc: The [ShowCultureName('maori_culture')] people of [ShowRegionName('new_zealand_region')] have always divided themselves into separate tribes, deeply connected through kinship and marriage. On one hand, our separation and individualism has created a cultural resilience that gives our traditional ways room to thrive. On the other hand, we could more easily repel attempted invaders were we to unite under a single banner and present our people as a holistic power. Perhaps this is the way of our future?
strings.TIM_f_desc: The many battles fought by our ancestors may have soaked the earth in blood, but that bloodshed in turn fed the soil, and from this adversity was born a race of warriors, architects, artists, and scientists. The time has come to share our many gifts with the world by stepping forward as a great nation. We will follow [GetCharacter('chg_timur_lame_borjigin').GetName]'s legacy, and lead our people to greatness!
strings.INC_f_desc: The Altiplano is divided among many nations, each inhabiting the valleys and worshiping different gods. We are a people who speak many tongues and have diverse perspectives, yet together we represent a cultural and spiritual force few other nations could stand against. We shall bring all our scattered territories together to follow one strong leader. The sun shall cast its light over a unified realm!
strings.BNG_f_desc: The people from [ShowAreaName('bengal_area')] have a very distinct identity, forged on the banks of the mighty Ganges river. Millennia of overlapping cultures and traditions have led to the development of a particularly rich and unique [ShowCultureName('bengali')] culture, one that should be the envy of the world. [ShowCultureNameWithNoTooltip('bengali')] people are proud of their history and shared traditions — united, we would be as a beacon for the rest of $india$.
strings.DLH_f_desc:
Delhi was once the capital of the entire Indian subcontinent, and our own modern state is in many ways a continuation of their traditions.
The time of our resurgence has finally come. Let us reclaim the heritage of the sultans of Delhi, and rule the subcontinent from their ancient capital in the Doab!
strings.MCH_f_desc: The people of [ShowRegionName('manchuria_region')] have a long history of both nomadic tribal living and frequent interactions with the [GetInternationalOrganizationType('middle_kingdom').GetName]. As such, we have blended aspects from many cultures and places to create our own distinct way of life. Although we are usually divided into numerous tribes, a united [ShowRegionNameWithNoTooltip('manchuria_region')] may be able to claim hegemony over all $china$. Shall we press forward with unification?
strings.SER_f_desc: The Land of the Serbs has been divided and ruled by foreign powers for far too long, this is an insult to our national pride. Our people long to be ruled by one born among them. The path to unification is hard, but we must not rest until every city and settlement from the Danube to the southern mountains belongs to Serbia once more.
strings.AIR_f_desc: The mountains of [ShowAreaName('air_area')] have served as refuge for the [ShowCultureName('tuareg')] peoples for centuries, an island of green amidst the sand dunes of the desert. This area is rich in resources and well-fortified, making it a perfect stronghold from which to command our new nation. With our people finally united as one, these mountains will serve as the first step on our quest for expansion.
strings.NAV_f_desc: Originally a march of the Carolingian Empire, the legendary [ShowReligionGroupAdjective('christian')] kingdom founded by the warlord Íñigo Arista has been lost for too long. These lands must be reunited, and the [ShowCultureName('basque')] peoples unified under the chained banner of Navarre!
strings.KOJ_f_desc: Jerusalem is the promised land, a sacred city that people of many faiths look to as the birthplace of their beliefs. Thus, a Kingdom of Heaven shall be proclaimed over this holy land. Let all who worship be amazed at our splendor!
strings.YMT_f_desc: The [ShowDynastyName('yamato_dynasty')] is ancient, and claims descent from the gods themselves. Their very existence grants them a claim to the divine leadership of all [ShowRegionName('japan_region')]. And who would be so arrogant as to stand against the seed of the gods and their rightful rule?
strings.MUG_f_desc: Our ruler has begun to lay the foundations for a new empire. Although inferior in numbers, our well-disciplined troops have won several decisive victories against the sultans of $india$. These battles for $india$ are merely the first great victories in what will surely be a series of successful territorial expansions. With time, the empire of the Mughals will stretch across not only this region, but all the world.
strings.NPL_f_desc: Despite their proud and ancient histories, the Himalayan kingdoms remain fragmented and weak. By uniting the entire region under one ruler, we could become an unstoppable force, capable of challenging the soft, voluptuous rulers of $HIN$. Content to live off their wealth, they have squandered their riches for generations, and will be no match for our hardened armies.
strings.TIB_f_desc: The Tibetan Plateau was once united under a sprawling empire, which rivaled other great powers of its time for sophistication and wealth. However, over the centuries, that empire fell apart, irrevocably damaged by religious and political strife. But by bringing the [ShowCultureGroupName('tibetan_group')] peoples together once again, we can revive our prodigal legacy and restore our lost kingdom.
strings.SHL_f_desc: After many years of being controlled by one noble family or another, we have finally established ourselves as the supreme rulers of [ShowAreaName('holstein_area')]. It is our right to reform our territorial possessions into one country, and therefore we shall.
strings.RUM_f_desc: At its height, the Sultanate of Rum was the major power in [ShowRegionName('anatolia_region')]. Sadly, it was fragmented by constant brutal invasions and vicious succession disputes, falling into obscurity. But we have the will and the power to reforge the broken pieces of [ShowRegionNameWithNoTooltip('anatolia_region')] under one rule and restore our long-forgotten Sultanate!
strings.MGE_f_desc: The empire of $genghis_khan_name$, once the mightiest in the world, has all but disappeared. We are now a fragmented people, scattered and disconnected. But we are still Mongols, and we have never lost hope of capturing what we have lost. We must restore our legacy by replicating the Great $rank_kingdom_horde_ruler_suffix_male$'s conquests. The Mongol Empire will rise to conquer once more!
strings.MGO_f_desc: The people of $mongolia_region$ have not seen unity since the times of the great $genghis_khan_name$. It is now in our hands to unify the tribes once again and march into a new era of conquests.
strings.ILK_f_desc: Our empire once stretched across the world, endless and vibrant. Now it is a mere story, a historical footnote. This cannot stand — we are the heirs to the legacy of [GetCharacter('hulegu_khan_borjigin').GetName], and we deserve more! We shall reform our once-glorious empire, uniting our people and retaking what was once ours. And then more...
strings.GEO_f_desc: The very landscape of [ShowAreaName('georgia_area')] and the ravages of foreign incursion have repeatedly tested our people's resilience, but we have triumphed, proving ourselves as tough as the mountains and highlands that protect us. With grit and determination, we shall see $GEO$ rise once again and flourish under our leadership.
strings.ARM_f_desc: The [ShowCultureName('armenian_culture')] people are an ancient civilization, with a history beginning before even the time of the Romans. We have endured the rise and fall of conquering empires without losing either our mother tongue or our faith. Now we shall reunite the scattered heirs of Hayk under one banner and one $ARM_ADJ$ identity!
strings.SWI_f_desc: The [GetUniqueInternationalOrganization('swiss_confederation').GetName] began as a mere alliance between different cantons. Each part has developed separately, speaking different languages and even having different laws. To truly unify the [ShowCultureGroupName('swiss_group')], a sovereign power must establish dominance in the Swiss Plateau. While unifying so many different people will not be easy, we stand to gain much if we are successful.
strings.AYU_f_desc: A major trading hub with extensive foreign connections and a large population, the city of $ayutthaya$ will serve as a new source of power for the [ShowCultureName('thai_culture')], from which we can forge a path towards greater glory. As a united people, we will stand proudly against any who seek to breach our borders.
strings.ALB_f_desc: Traditionally a land of diverse beliefs and disparate clans, we have finally united the $ALB_ADJ$ people under a single banner and purpose. Now that we have expelled unwelcome outsiders and created a nascent state, $ALB$ shall emerge as the heroic home nation of all $ALB_ADJ$ people.
strings.BAH_f_desc: For more than a century, we stood as the dominant [ShowReligionGroupName('muslim')] power in the south and controlled vast territories across the [ShowRegionName('deccan_region')], but those splendid ancient cities were left in shambles long ago. Though internal strife and the rampant ambitions of provincial governors eventually split our realm into five successor sultanates, the time has come to restore the glory of the $BAH_ADJ$ people and unite the [ShowRegionNameWithNoTooltip('deccan_region')] under a single, powerful rule.
strings.GLD_f_desc: We have gained possession of vast territories in Poland. Rather than impose direct rule over this diverse region, we shall establish the $GLD$ as a crown land, allowing us to govern through traditional titles while maintaining imperial control.
strings.DAH_f_desc: We have consolidated our territories and will now be able to establish a new country to resist foreign influences.
strings.IRO_f_desc: The tribes of the [ShowCultureGroupName('haudenosaunee_group')] have long coexisted in a formal confederation, although each nation within the tribe retained its own autonomy. But times have changed, and we have made the strategic decision to make our current ties even stronger. With the five nations now led by a central tribe, we can push forward as a newly strengthened confederacy.
strings.PUE_f_desc: Descendants of the ancestral Puebloans, the tribes of [ShowAreaName('shiewhibak_area')] have retained aspects of their ancestral ways despite having diverged into varying cultures. While we desire unification of these fractured tribes, this means we must contend with new cultural developments that have sprung up in individual pueblos. But these idiosyncrasies will make our union stronger and more unique, if we can find harmony.
strings.RMN_f_desc: The last vestiges of the $ROM_f$ are gone, and although many pretenders claim the imperial crown, only we are its true descendants. When the lands of our ancestors have finally been reunited under a single flag, only then will we be rewarded with the prosperity that is our birthright. We are the children of Rome - the people of $RMN$!
strings.SWA_f_desc: After the decline of central power in [ShowAreaName('swabia_area')], no ruler was able to restore the old $SWA$ to its former strength, and the lands slowly fell into the grasp of foreign countries. Now, with large parts of [ShowAreaName('swabia_area')] back under our control, we can finally rescue our legacy from the ashes of history and forge a new state.
strings.WES_f_desc: Our people were once held in thrall by severe religious oppression, but we have seen a new way — a better way — a way that will allow us to become a fully realized nation at last. As these religious influences slowly fade into the past, we shall form a new state for [ShowAreaName('westphalia_area')] and proclaim the dawning of a new era for our people.
strings.BEL_f_desc: The southern lands of the Low Countries are home to a people divided along linguistic and religious lines. But if we were to bring these squabbling groups together and have them working towards the goal of self-government, perhaps it would flatten the differences between us. To this end, we desire to declare ourselves a new and independent state.
strings.FKN_f_desc: Once the seat of a powerful stem duchy, [ShowAreaName('franconia_area')] has declined over the centuries, and the associated title of Duke of [ShowAreaNameWithNoTooltip('franconia_area')] has become nominal and irrelevant. But if we re-established our authority and were able to solidify control over the old duchy, we could finally resurrect the $FKN$ and restore its tarnished former splendor.
strings.HAN_f_desc: With the majority of [ShowAreaName('lower_saxony_area')] under our control, and [ShowLocationName('hanover')] secured, we will be able to proclaim ourselves as a new country, a beacon of strength to lead our people into the future! With determination and cunning, we shall establish ourselves as a decisive power within [ShowRegionName('north_german_region')].
strings.TUS_f_desc: The ancient March of Tuscany endured for centuries, but after the death of their ruler Matilda of Canossa in 1115, it eventually faded away. Its former territory was carved up and claimed by various ascendant urban communes, and the memory of a united Tuscany faded into darkness. But circumstances have changed, and it may now be time to reunite our dispersed lands and people under one rule again.
strings.BUL_f_desc: The Kingdom of Bulgaria fought for its own survival for centuries, constantly hounded by attacks from its covetous neighbors. It has fallen once, been resurrected, and then again crumbled. But with our steady hand to guide them, the people of $BUL$ will finally rise again as one nation, and this time, achieve the status of a major global empire!
strings.DAL_f_desc: Dalmatia has traditionally been a region dominated by foreigners, as its coasts, islands, and bays are all paramount to dominating the extremely lucrative [ShowProvinceDefinitionName('adriatic_sea_province')] trade routes. But why should foreigners reap the benefit of Dalmatia, when her own people deserve her riches far more? It is finally time to shake off foreign control of the region and establish an independent $DAL$!
strings.HUN_f_desc: The old Kingdom of Hungary was once the ultimate power in [ShowRegionName('carpathia_region')], controlling the region for centuries. But even the strongest walls cannot stand forever, and the old state eventually fell apart, thanks to invasion and expansions by our rivals. Yet we have arrived at the precipice of greatness, and the time to resurrect the fallen $HUN$ is finally at hand. Let us rise to the great imperial heights we deserve to reach!
strings.KRS_f_desc: The [ShowCultureName('kurdish_culture')] people have always lived in autonomous tribes, without a central unifying figure to lead them. But if we were to establish a [ShowCultureNameWithNoTooltip('kurdish_culture')] nation, and to bring our scattered groups together as one, we could easily become the authoritative power in the region.
strings.SOI_f_desc: From the grasslands of [ShowContinentName('africa')], to the sands of [ShowRegionName('arabia_region')], and even to the coasts of $india$, the [ShowCultureName('somali_culture')] people have walked between many different worlds, and absorbed the many lessons these places had to teach us. But if we were to draw our people together as one, using the knowledge gained from such a cosmopolitan history, a united country for all [ShowRegionName('somalia_region')] would be a powerful one.
strings.CRO_f_desc: The land of [ShowAreaName('croatia_area')] has been point of encounter between European West and East for centuries, between the waters of the Mediterranean and the many countries of the interior. Having been traversed by many peoples and cultures, it is under the [ShowCultureName('croatian')] identity that it will be able to flourish.
strings.TRA_f_desc: 'The Lands Beyond the Forest' are rich with mineral resources and fertile farmlands, and populated by peoples of different origins — Vlachs, Magyars, and Germans — all of whom are proud of these lands they inhabit. From our capital, we will rule over this diverse group of newly-minted $TRA_ADJ$ people, and bring prosperity to them all.
strings.MAL_f_desc: The lands of the [ShowCultureName('mandinka')] have a proud history of wealth, cultural influence, and piety, exemplified by our forefather [GetCharacter('mal_musa_keita').GetName]. Although this resplendence has been lost to time, if we were united once again, we could restore the commercial networks and political unity that once made the [ShowCultureNameWithNoTooltip('mandinka')] masters of trade, and elevate our people to never-before-seen echelons of power.
strings.NUB_f_desc: Our nation is ancient, but it has not endured. Divided among competing rulers, we have one by one fallen prey to stronger enemies. The lands before the Nile Cataracts must be unified under a single rule, capable of resisting those enemies and defeating them in battle, if we are ever to rise again as a realized power in this world.
strings.FIN_f_desc: Over the centuries, the [ShowCultureName('finnish')] people have been ruled by foreign powers, and their lands controlled by foreign hands. But we have never lost our distinct Finnish ways nor our desire to subdue those who would oppress us for them, and our moment to break away is finally here. The time has come for the state of $FIN$ to be born and take its place among the pantheon of nations!
strings.ICE_f_desc: Circumstances have led to our holdings in [ShowAreaName('iceland_area')] developing into the foremost part of our country. Let us embrace this new identity and establish the nation of $ICE$. We shall strengthen our local institutions, firmly entrenching our right to rule over the island and bringing our people together at last.
strings.KAZ_f_desc: Across the windswept expanse of the steppes, the [ShowCultureName('kazakh')] people roam free without a unifying ruler, leaving us vulnerable to outside attacks. But were we to finally be brought together under the command of a single leader, and to share an identity as a nation, we could turn the tide. Thus, we shall unite under one flag to rule the seas of grass as mighty $KAZ$.
strings.MIR_f_desc: Ours is an island of many influences, a conflux of cultures that has created unique syncretic beliefs and ways of life. Although this mixture of differences is part of what makes us great, we should promote the idea of our being a unified people despite these distinctions. A unified Malagasy state under our leadership will allow our island to prosper and ensure stability — and increased power — for our people.
strings.MOR_f_desc: The history of our nation is one of rise and fall, great dynasties collapsing only to be reborn. Yet among the ebb and flow of this dynastic chaos, our culture shines like a precious jewel. We are a people of art, learning, science, and progress, the light in this region. Our nation must achieve lasting stability and grow powerful through unity, ensuring the prosperity of our people and striking fear into the hearts of our enemies.
strings.NUS_f_desc: [ShowRegionName('indonesia_region')] is a rich land, overflowing with precious resources and luxuries. Although its people are varied and diverse, many of their traditional cultural aspects are the same, mainly due to the diffusive effects of maritime trade. Were we to unite these many islands and peoples under one banner, we would be a strong contender for ultimate regional dominance.
strings.SLO_f_desc: Ever since the collapse of the Great Moravian State, the [ShowCultureName('slovak')] people have been ruled by foreign powers, who govern over us with little regard to our interests. But during this dark period, we have slowly but surely been growing our power, our people drawing closer together in solidarity. It is finally time to assert our sovereignty and establish a state free from foreign rule.
strings.BNO_f_desc: The island of Borneo is bountiful and rich, both in natural resources and in the variety of peoples and cultures who call it home. Unifying us all under a single identity will ensure that our precious resources remain ours, and that only we will benefit from their exploitation.
strings.CIR_f_desc: The division of the Circassian people into separate competing tribes must end. If we wish to grow strong and not succumb to external pressure, we must be brought together under a single powerful leader who can skillfully guide our people towards prosperity — and strike terror deep in the hearts of our enemies.
strings.AZT_f_desc: The $AZT_f$ Empire stands as a symbol of divinity and imperial destiny. From the sacred city of [ShowLocationName('tenochtitlan')], our glorious leaders have succeeded in uniting large parts of [ShowRegionName('mesoamerica_region')] under one radiant Sun. Through faith, warfare, and sacrifice, our newfound empire shall reclaim its sacred purpose of ensuring that the heavens burn bright, and the gods are honored.
strings.PON_f_desc: Founded by Mithridates I Ktistes (meaning #italic the Builder#!), Pontus became a vibrant and wealthy crossroads between Persian and Anatolian roots, blended with Hellenistic influences. Strategically positioned between easily defensible mountainous terrain and seafaring [ShowCultureName('greek_culture')] coastal communities, the Kingdom prospered, including important cities such as Amaseia and Sinope. At the height of its power, the realm stretched from the depths of [ShowAreaName('cappadocia_area')] to the coasts of [ShowAreaName('crimea_area')]. By reasserting such a glorious legacy, we affirm our right to rule these lands in an undisputed manner.
strings.hre_desc: The glory of the ancient Roman Empire lives in the memory of all in [ShowContinentName('europe')]. [GetCharacter('fra_charlemagne').GetName] was crowned Roman Emperor, but it was not until the coronation of [GetCharacter('ogk_otto_liudolfinger').GetName] that the current $hre$ was born, with the ambitions of forming a revived and unified European Empire.
strings.middle_kingdom_desc: The Middle Kingdom refers to China, considered the cultural center of Far East Asia since Antiquity, and therefore in the center — or middle — of the world.
strings.AEG_f_desc: Forge a restored empire of the Nile, fusing Mamluk military legitimacy with the Pharaonic dynastic continuity claimed by Cairo's sultans. Aegyptus binds the lower and upper Nile, the Levant, the Hijaz, Nubia, and Cyrenaica under a Sultan-as-Pharaoh ideology that traces its line from Memphis through Babylon-of-Egypt to the citadel of Salah ad-Din. From Cyrene to Mecca to Khartoum, the New Kingdom's reach is reborn under the banner of an Islamic Pharaoh.
strings.AHM_f_desc: Restore the Swargadeo's mandate over the Brahmaputra valley. Six centuries of Tai-Ahom rule held this corner of South Asia against every wave of invaders, repelling the Mughals seventeen times and binding hill, valley, and river under the Buranji court chronicles, the paik corvee system, and a religion that wove Tai animism into Saiva and Vaishnava devotion. The unconquered kingdom of Charaideo is reborn.
strings.ALM_f_desc: The Almohad Caliphate (al-Muwaḥḥidūn, 'those who affirm divine unity') was the Berber Muslim empire that succeeded the Almoravids and united the Maghreb and al-Andalus under a single rule from its capital at Marrakesh. Founded on the religious reform movement of Ibn Tumart and consolidated by Abd al-Mu'min, at its height under Yaqub al-Mansur it stretched from the Atlantic shores of Morocco across to Tripolitania and northward into Iberia, where Sevilla served as its peninsular seat. A Maghrebi Sunni state with Marrakesh and Fez as its core, it requires the Almohad core in North Africa; reuniting al-Andalus is the Caliph's prerogative, not his prerequisite.
strings.ANV_f_desc: Re-forge the cross-Channel dominion of Henry II Plantagenet, binding the Kingdom of England to the duchies of Normandy and Aquitaine and the county of Anjou under a single crown. A Catholic realm of Anglo-Norman, French, Norman and Occitan subjects, the Angevin Empire was the largest territorial polity of twelfth-century Western Europe — and its restoration would shatter the foundations of the modern French kingdom.
strings.ARC_f_desc: Restore the Armenian Kingdom of Cilicia under the Hethumid crown, the Mediterranean realm that for two centuries bridged Apostolic Christendom and the Latin Crusader world from its capital at Sis. Where highland Bagratid Armenia looks east to the Caucasus, Cilician Armenia faces the sea: a kingdom of merchant ports, Italian trading concessions, and knights in eastern surcoats. Forge an Armenian thalassocracy along the Levantine coast, master Cyprus and the spice routes, and prove that the kingdom the Mamluks broke in 1375 could yet have outlasted them.
strings.ATE_f_desc: The Ashanti Confederacy united the Akan peoples under the Golden Stool, forging a powerful kingdom centered on Kumasi. Through control of the gold trade and a sophisticated military organization, the Asantehene could project power across the Gold Coast and deep into the West African interior.
strings.BNH_f_desc: Beth Nahrain — 'Land Between the Rivers' in Syriac — restores Mesopotamia under the Christian heirs of Nineveh and Edessa. The Patriarchs of the Church of the East still rule diaspora flocks from the Tigris to Cathay; the monasteries of Tur Abdin have weathered Mongol, Mamluk and Turkmen overlords with their autonomy intact; the County of Edessa proved that a Latin-Syriac state could hold the upper Jazira. Forming Beth Nahrain consolidates these threads into a single Aramaic-speaking Christian polity centered on Mosul, the ancient seat of the Patriarchate, with Tur Abdin and Edessa as its spiritual lungs.
strings.CDA_f_desc: Forge the Catalan-Aragonese Mediterranean thalassocracy that briefly bound Iberia to Italy under a single sovereign — the alternative path of unification that ended when Castile absorbed Aragon in 1469. Restore the multi-kingdom personal union of Alfonso V the Magnanimous, holding the royal seats of Barcelona, Naples and Palermo, and ruling Aragon, Catalonia, Valencia, the Balearics, Sardinia, Sicily and the Mezzogiorno from a peripatetic court. A maritime mercantile empire of Catalan consulates, Almogavar mercenaries, the Consolat de Mar and the Senyera Reial — the Aragon that looked east across the sea instead of west toward Castile.
strings.CSO_f_desc: The Song dynasty represented China's commercial and technological golden age. Though the Southern Song lost the northern plains to the Jurchen Jin, they built an unrivaled maritime trading economy centered on the Yangtze delta and the great port of Hangzhou. Restoring the Song means rejecting continental empire in favor of a compact, prosperous realm defined by trade, innovation, and naval power.
strings.DRR_f_desc: Forge a Pashtun-led empire spanning the crossroads of Persia, Central Asia, and Hindustan, in the tradition of Ahmad Shah Durrani's loya jirga at Kandahar in 1747. The Durrani Empire was the second-largest Muslim power of its day, binding the Afghan tribal confederation, Khorasan, Sindh, and Punjab into a single realm under the standard of the Abdali.
strings.EDO_f_desc: The Kingdom of Benin was one of the most powerful and sophisticated states in pre-colonial West Africa, centered on the Edo people and the city of Benin. Ruled by the Oba, the kingdom was renowned for its centralized administration, formidable military, and extraordinary court art, the famed Benin Bronzes. An Edo ruler who consolidates the Benin heartland and the lower Niger can restore the kingdom to its former grandeur.
strings.GBU_f_desc: The Burgundian Middle Kingdom revived. Forged from the corridor of wealth that Philip the Good and Charles the Bold welded into a single composite state, Greater Burgundy unites the Flemish cities, the Walloon marches, Lorraine, the Free County, and the ducal heartland into a sovereign kingdom answering to neither Paris nor the Empire. The crown Charles sought at Trier is at last placed upon Burgundian brows, the Order of the Golden Fleece its chivalric backbone.
strings.HOS_f_desc: Refound the Sovereign Military Hospitaller Order of Saint John of Jerusalem, the crusading brotherhood that lost the Holy Land yet endured. From their fortress on Rhodes — and later from Malta — the Knights of Saint John maintain the eight-pointed white cross as a sovereign Catholic order: a multinational brotherhood of langues, a fleet that hounds the corsairs of the Mediterranean, and a hospitalier tradition that founded the first true hospitals of Christendom.
strings.KBU_f_desc: The Kanem-Bornu Empire, ruled by the Sayfawa dynasty for over seven centuries, dominated the Lake Chad basin and controlled vital trans-Saharan trade routes. By reuniting the original Kanem heartland with the Bornu territories, the empire stands poised to reassert its supremacy over the central Sahel.
strings.KHL_f_desc: The universal Sunni Khilafah, restored after a millennium of dynastic fragmentation. From al-Andalus to Sindh, from the Atlas to the Indus, one Caliph commands the ummah; Mecca, Medina, Cairo, Damascus, Baghdad, and the seats of the old Umayyad and Abbasid worlds answer to a single throne. This is not the Caliphate of any one dynasty, Umayyad, Abbasid, Fatimid, Almohad, or Ottoman, but the Rashidun ideal made flesh: the universal community of believers under one banner. The black standard of the Prophet flies again over a world united in faith.
strings.KWS_f_desc: The Kilwa Sultanate was the wealthiest and most powerful of the Swahili coast city-states, controlling the gold trade from the interior of southeastern Africa to the Indian Ocean from the 12th to 16th century. By uniting the Swahili trading cities under one banner, a ruler can restore Kilwa's maritime commercial empire and dominate the Indian Ocean trade routes once more.
strings.LBE_f_desc: The Luba Empire was a powerful Central African state centered on the Upemba Depression and the upper Lualaba River. Renowned for its Balopwe system of divine kingship, a model of governance so effective that neighboring peoples across the savanna adopted it, the Luba state united diverse communities through sacred authority, copper trade, and artistic patronage.
strings.LXA_f_desc: The Kingdom of Lan Xang, the Land of a Million Elephants, was the great unified Lao kingdom founded by Fa Ngum in 1354. Stretching from the Khorat Plateau to the northern highlands of the upper Mekong, it was one of the largest kingdoms in Southeast Asia until internal strife split it into the rival kingdoms of Luang Prabang, Vientiane, and Champasak in 1707. A Lao ruler who controls both ancient capitals may restore this once-mighty realm.
strings.MAP_f_desc: Forge the scattered Lof, Rewe, and Aillarewe of the Mapuche people into a single sovereign confederation. From the forests of Ngulumapu to the steppes of Puelmapu, the Reche who turned back the Inca and broke the Spanish at Curalaba now claim a recognized kingdom over the whole land between the cordillera and the sea. The Toki shall lead the federation in war, the Machi shall keep its spirit, and no foreign crown shall set foot south of the Bío-Bío unbidden.
strings.MCA_f_desc: The Muisca Confederation unites the highland chiefdoms of the Altiplano Cundiboyacense under a single political authority. By bringing together the domains of the Zipa at Bacatá and the Zaque at Hunza, alongside the sacred precinct of Suamox, a confederation of master goldsmiths and emerald traders emerges as the dominant power of the Colombian highlands.
strings.MRL_f_desc: The maharlika were the warrior-noble class of Tagalog society, the freemen who bore arms beside their datus and rajahs. Their cognates, the timawa of the Visayas, the maginoo of Luzon's coastal polities, and the bagani of Mindanao, formed the martial backbone of every Filipino people from Aparri to Sulu. Maharlika is the pan-archipelago nation that history never produced: a unified indigenous polity binding Luzon, the Visayas, and Mindanao under the freeman ideal, before Spanish galleons could ever reach Cebu. Form Maharlika to forge the Filipino civilization that drove out, or simply outlasted, every European, Dutch, and Bruneian incursion.
strings.MRO_f_desc: The Moro Sultanate is the unrealized pan-Islamic confederation of Mindanao and Sulu — the Sultan-Caliph to whom the rival sultanates of Sulu, Maguindanao, Lanao, and Buayan, the rajahs of Butuan, and the datus of Zamboanga and the Iranun coast all swore a single oath of fealty. Its warrior aristocracy carries the wavy-bladed kris and kalis; its vinta fleets, lateen-rigged and faster than any galleon, harry Spanish, Dutch, and English intruders from the Sulu Sea to the Visayas. Forming it requires unifying Mindanao under the Sunni faith and seating a single Caliph at Maimbung and Kuta Watu — the alternative to three centuries of colonial conquest the southern islands never accepted.
strings.MTP_f_desc: The Kingdom of Mutapa was founded by Nyatsimba Mutota when the Karanga Shona expanded northward from Great Zimbabwe to the Zambezi valley in search of salt and new lands. At its height, Mutapa controlled the gold trade of southeastern Africa, channeling the wealth of the interior through Sofala to merchants on the Swahili Coast. To restore the Mutapa is to reunite the Shona heartland and reclaim mastery over the region's legendary riches.
strings.NIN_f_desc: Athur reborn. Where the Patriarchate of the East and the monastic networks of Tur Abdin furnish the political continuity, the Sargonid imperial template furnishes the form: Nineveh as capital, a professional standing army, an Aramaic civil service, and the deportation-and-integration administration that once bound Babylon, the Levant, and Memphis under one crown. This is what the Neo-Assyrian Empire might have looked like had it survived through the Catholicate of Seleucia-Ctesiphon — a counterfactual revival of the 671 BC peak under Esarhaddon and Ashurbanipal, channeled through medieval Syriac Christian institutions and crowned at Nineveh.
strings.NUM_f_desc: Form Numunu Sookobitu, the Comanche country, as a sovereign Plains-horse empire. From the Llano Estacado heartland the paraibos and tekwuniwapi unite the Penateka, Yamparika, Quahadi, Nokoni, and Kotsoteka divisions into a single confederation, extracting tribute from the borderlands and turning the bison economy into the foundation of a continental power. This is the Comanche Empire as Pekka Hämäläinen described it: an Indigenous state that imposed its will on the Southern Plains for a century and a half, made permanent.
strings.NZO_f_desc: Nanzhao was the great Bai and Yi kingdom centered on Lake Erhai in Yunnan, uniting the six zhao under a single throne from 738 to 902 CE. At its height it rivaled the Tang dynasty, conquering southern Sichuan, western Guizhou, and the Pyu city-states of upper Burma. A restored Nanzhao would reclaim this multi-ethnic highland empire spanning the crossroads between China, Tibet, and Southeast Asia.
strings.OYE_f_desc: The Oyo Empire was the most powerful Yoruba state and one of the largest empires in West Africa, renowned for its fearsome cavalry corps and sophisticated constitutional government balancing the Alaafin's authority with the Oyo Mesi council. Uniting the Yoruba heartland under the leadership of Oyo-Ile, this empire dominated trade routes between the forest and savanna zones from the fifteenth to early nineteenth centuries.
strings.PNT_f_desc: When the warrior-aristocrats of Panay, Cebu, Samar, Leyte, Bohol, and Negros set aside their feuds and federate, the painted men of the islands rise as one civilization. Bound by the ink of their full-body tattoos, the prayers of their babaylan priestesses, and the long balangay hulls that carry their raid-fleets across the inner seas, the datus pool their honor under a single confederate banner: Kabisay-an, the Pintados, the painted ones of legend. The Spaniards who name them so will find no scattered chiefdoms to pick apart, but a maritime warrior nation forged from the shared blood of every Visayan island.
strings.SOE_f_desc: The Songhai Empire was the largest state in African history, dominating the Niger Bend and the trans-Saharan trade routes from its capital at Gao. Under Sonni Ali and Askia Muhammad, the empire absorbed the remnants of Mali, controlled the legendary cities of Timbuktu and Djenné, and became a center of Islamic scholarship. Restoring this empire means uniting the Sahel under Songhai rule once more.
strings.SVB_f_desc: Suvarnabhumi — the 'Land of Gold' of Buddhist sutras and stone inscriptions — is the mainland's own name for itself, the pan-Theravada empire that the Khmer cakkavatti, the Ayutthayan god-kings, the Toungoo conquerors, and the Lao mandala-lords all dreamed of in their turn. Forming Suvarnabhumi requires holding all four civilizational anchors of mainland Southeast Asia: Angkor's wat-temples, Ayutthaya's golden chedis, Bagan's stupa-strewn plain, and Vientiane's That Luang. Under one saffron-and-gold dharma-wheel banner, the four cultural cores of mainland Indochina answer to a single Buddhist universal monarch, fulfilling a vision that Bayinnaung briefly held and that fragmented at his death.
strings.TAB_f_desc: Forge a sovereign Hussite commonwealth from the radical wing of the Hussite Wars: peasant-soldier brotherhood, vernacular chalice church, and the Four Articles of Prague made law. Where Bohemia compromised at Lipany, the Taborites institutionalize their war-wagon militia, married priesthood, and elective communal rule into a permanent state.
strings.TBT_f_desc: Restore the Yarlung-era empire (Bod chen po) of Songtsen Gampo, Trisong Detsen, and Ralpacan, when Tibetan armies rode from Lhasa to the Tang frontier and held the Tarim Basin against China. This is the warrior-imperial Tibet of stone-pillar edicts and the Bon-Buddhist synthesis, not the later Gelug theocracy of the lamas. From the Potala to Samye, the Tsenpo's banner rises again over the Roof of the World.
strings.TDR_f_desc: Reforge the lost realm of the Pontic shore: a Greco-Gothic kingdom anchored at Mangup, heir to the Theodorite princes and to the ancient Bosporan dynasts before them. Whether it takes the form of a Romaic Regnum Bospori or a Cimmerian Bosporus of Gothic kings depends on which lineage its court chooses to honour.
strings.TGD_f_desc: The Tang dynasty was China's cosmopolitan golden age, when the Silk Road flowed through Chang'an and Chinese power projected deep into Central Asia. Though the dynasty fell in 907, its memory endured as the aspirational ideal of Chinese empire, a realm defined not by walls but by roads, where Buddhist monks, Sogdian merchants, and Turkic generals all served beneath the dragon banner. Restoring the Great Tang means reuniting the Chinese heartland with the western corridor and reclaiming mastery of the Silk Road.
strings.TKT_f_desc: Reconstitute the Pauperes Commilitones Christi Templique Salomonici as a sovereign religious-military order, refusing the dissolution of 1312 and inheriting the Iberian banking houses, Atlantic fleet, and Tomar convent that history allowed only the Order of Christ to keep. The Templar Sovereign State stands as the Catholic world's first international banking corporation made into a state, an Atlantic-facing knightly republic of treasurers, navigators, and quiet heretics whose secret chapter answers only to the pope who lifted Clement V's bull.
strings.VJN_f_desc: Restore the imperial dignity of Vijayanagara, the great Hindu empire of the south. Forged in the crucible of resistance against the Deccan sultanates and elevated to its zenith under Krishnadeva Raya, the Karnata Rajya unites the Dravidian peoples under the boar-banner of Varaha — guardian of dharma, patron of temples, and master of the spice-trading coasts.
strings.YAV_f_desc: The Yavana Empire represents a revival of the ancient Indo-Greek kingdoms that once flourished in the lands of Sindh and Gandhara. 'Yavana,' the term used in Indian sources for Greeks and their descendants, evokes the extraordinary Greco-Buddhist synthesis that produced some of the subcontinent's greatest art and philosophy. Under a Sammitiya Buddhist ruler of Sindhi origin, this restoration fuses Hellenistic political traditions with the dharmic culture of the Indus valley, reclaiming the legacy of Menander and Demetrius.
strings.YMP_f_desc: The dream Toyotomi Hideyoshi died chasing. In 1592 he hurled the samurai armies of unified Japan against Korea and on toward Ming China, intending nothing less than a Japanese-led empire over all East Asia; only his death in 1598 collapsed the campaign and gave Tokugawa his pretext for two and a half centuries of isolation. The Yamato Empire is the alternative: the bakufu refuses sakoku, the Imjin War succeeds, and the chrysanthemum throne extends from Hokkaido through Hanseong to the Yangtze. Japanese castles rise above Pyongyang, samurai become the imperial officer corps of a continental order, and the Mikado reigns over an East Asian empire built from Edo's ambition rather than Edo's seclusion.
